pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/setup_task.sh:10-15 & examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/export_result.sh:9-18 (both scripts create and inspect the stack at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/monitor-stack).

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/export_result.sh:12-75 & examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/verifier.py:43-97 (the exporter queries monitor/proxy containers by name and the verifier grades those service results).

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/export_result.sh:20-33 & examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/task.json:5 (the exporter explicitly checks that /var/run/docker.sock is absent from the monitor container while the task description mandates removing the raw socket mount).
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_socket_proxy_nginx/task.json:5 (task description requires the nginx proxy to expose the Docker socket on TCP port 2375 and configure DOCKER_HOST accordingly).

privileged_info_summary: The setup script fabricates the monitor stack entirely under /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/monitor-stack, and the export/verifier logic expects two services named monitor and proxy while enforcing that only the proxy retains /var/run/docker.sock; the task description also mandates the proxy listen on TCP port 2375 for the monitor's DOCKER_HOST.
